pom.xml.general_idea: Update Maven compiler source and target properties to Java 21 to align with the new JDK version.
pom.xml.why_exists: Without this change, the project compiles against Java 17 language features, failing to utilize or enforce Java 21 syntax and semantics required by the migration.

pom.xml.general_idea: Upgrade Maven Compiler Plugin version to a snapshot release compatible with Java 21.
Add Jakarta Annotation API dependency to replace removed javax.annotation APIs in Java 21.
pom.xml.why_exists: Java 21 removed the javax.annotation package (e.g., @Generated, @PostConstruct) from the standard library; code using these annotations will fail to compile without the explicit Jakarta dependency.
